literal: Again and again

arabic: أَعْضُدْ وَخَلِّصْ وَارْحَمْ وَاحْفَظْنَا يَا اللَّهُ بِنِعْمَتِكَ
translation: Help, save, have mercy, and preserve us, O God, by Your grace
literal: Support and save and have mercy and preserve us, O God, by Your grace
for the sake of our salvation
indeed, you accepted to be embodied
who has not ceased being deathless

translation: Only-begotten Son and Word of God
literal: O Word of God, the Only-Begotten Son
for the sake of this holy house
The Priest
from the holy Mother of God

arabic: وَالَّذِينَ يَدْخُلُونَ إِلَيْهِ بِإِيمَانٍ وَوَرَعٍ وَخَوْفِ اللَّه
translation: and those who with faith, reverence, and the fear of God enter therein
literal: and those who enter into it with faith and reverence and fear of God
The Choir
The Deacon

translation: and wast crucified, O Christ our God
literal: and you were crucified, O Christ our God
Antiphons
O Word of God
the ever-virgin Mary
and you became human without alteration
save us
O Lord, have mercy

arabic: وَأَنْتَ لَمْ تَزَلْ أَحَدَ الثّالوثِ الْقَدّوسِ
translation: who art one of the Holy Trinity
literal: and you have not ceased being one of the Holy Trinity

translation: glorified together with the Father and the Holy Spirit
literal: glorified with the Father and the Holy Spirit

translation: For the peace of the whole world
literal: for the sake of peace of the whole world
and union of everyone

translation: and the salvation of our souls
literal: and salvation of our souls
Petition of peace
the Only-Begotten Son
Everyone
With peace
for the sake of the peace from on high

translation: and trampled down death by dath
literal: and by your death you trampled death

translation: let us pray to the Lord
literal: to the Lord we ask

translation: and the good estate of the holy churches of God
literal: and the good stability of the holy churches of God
